content: 关于最终法则，有些话想说，整体不做评价，因为他说的话不少是有道理的，我也是从开服第一天开始玩到现在的，产能是真的比第一年掉很多很多，毕竟第一年前期甚至会有一个版本两个角色，现在28天一个有时候还会拖，而且像熔朵这些是真的第一年就留下来的东西。给氪佬和真爱档动力其实是合理的，但是表述牢猫其实说的很模糊，只说不会到没有法则不能过，但是没说一个角色会不会变成法则完全体。讲白了，法则这个东西还是遗留问题，开始搞了个+12深化，但是后面的收益又那么低，如果一开始就常规的六命结束都不会像现在这样。但是不管怎么说，这个东西出了，会让一波玩家退坑我觉得是很正常的，而且这个东西出了拉新我觉得也会变得更难，毕竟我觉得不会有哪个新人听到十六命完全体还能轻易入坑并付费的。我还是对这个东西持否定态度，除非所有人的法则都是这一次这种水平，就聊胜于无的感觉，但是很明显，这不可能，甚至于法则不只局限于觉醒，那后面真来个法则完全体的角色也完全不脱离今天说的话。其实我觉得真想改不如大刀阔斧的改，把底层改了，改成现在常规二游的模式。
thread_title: 问&答：关于最终法则与未来规划 Q&A: Regarding Absolute Axiom and the Future Plan

content:
<@633215996508766229> 只要还能保持推出一定数量的男性角色，即便像“忘却篇”那样女性角色比例较高，我个人觉得也是完全没问题的——尽管我是那种更偏爱使用男性角色的玩家。我非常希望能实装成年版的奥吉尔，也梦想着能有男性的哈斯塔。希望在《Morimens》未来的更新中这些都能成真。

另外，我有一个个人目标，就是有一天能只用“全男队”达成 D-Tide 的完美通关 😅。但目前游戏里只有 12 位男性角色，而且其中几乎没有“银钥充能”型的辅助男角 wwww 😂 😭。按目前的开发规划，我觉得这个目标可能得等上 10 年才能实现了。但换个角度想，这意味着《Morimens》会有下一个 10 年，所以我还是很开心的。因为我真的很爱《Morimens》。感谢制作组一直以来的辛勤付出！

thread_title: 问&答：关于最终法则与未来规划 Q&A: Regarding Absolute Axiom and the Future Plan

content:
This doesn't really make sense to me. Morimens set the upper limit for duplicates at 16 copies which is way higher than most gacha games. Of course there are people who will try to reach it and be disappointed that it doesn't provide as much power as they expected, but dupes beyond +4 (already a lot) should be more of a flex in the first place. This feels like an artificial solution to an artificial problem.

Also, you're only factoring power level without considering that players get attached to characters for different reasons. For many players, locking an *interesting* mechanic behind Axiom is even more of a deal breaker. Only considering performance from a power perspective is flawed. People wouldn't invest into off-meta characters if they only cared about how strong a character is.

This system is meant to be an incentive for maxing Awakeners through "long-term F2P resource accumulation or direct support via purchases", but the game's economy simply isn't balanced this way. Our main endgame mode requires at least 20 Awakeners with the assumption that they are between E0 and E3, usually E2-E3 with new Awakeners. OE is already a huge luxury for F2P. While it's possible to get a +12 limited unit as a F2P player / light spender, the tradeoff is 2 OE units or 5 E3 units or roughly 8 months of investment. Only space whales can afford to +12 characters without crippling their own progression.

Just look at the feedback for this feature so far. Most of the support for it isn't people who want to use it, but rather people who don't mind it existing. How many people are looking at this and saying "wow, this makes me want to +12 characters now" relative to the players who are ambivalent or actively against it? I like B.I.A.V. and I appreciate what you (Light) do so I'll assume you have good intentions here, but many players are going to be driven away hearing about +12 passives whether they're good or not (they're already driven away hearing about OE).
thread_title: 问&答：关于最终法则与未来规划 Q&A: Regarding Absolute Axiom and the Future Plan

content: a solution would be to rise the free pulls a bit
thread_title: 问&答：关于最终法则与未来规划 Q&A: Regarding Absolute Axiom and the Future Plan

content: That wouldn't change much. +12 is simply too many additional dupes (15) when the Awakeners are balanced around having 0-3 dupes. It will always be a poor investment to opt for one +12 over several functional Awakeners because the game wants us to form 5-10 teams for the D-Tide. This feature is purely a flex for whales / veterans who have been playing for a couple years and do not care about spending their resources properly. Everyone else can only sit back and hope they don't lock anything too powerful/interesting behind Axioms because what else can they do? The vast majority of players will never obtain these passives.

content:
有沒有一種可能： 
把限定出貨率拉高 保底降低 那我一樣+12的期望值改成原本+6的（比原本多一些，但玩家體驗更舒服，萌新、老登都爽）那資源給的多，角色易養成玩家沒怨言，只是補償要另外給就是了（例如：老登多補150抽，新入坑萌新活動，打到一定程度進度給+4角色卷）
那你貓既可以賺到多的錢也可以留住更多玩家而且關卡水溫也有更多的時間與空間去調整
thread_title: 问&答：关于最终法则与未来规划 Q&A: Regarding Absolute Axiom and the Future Plan

content:
然後再補上各界域定向選擇給全體（讓老登萌新可以選擇補齊自己的第幾隻+12又可以讓大家都吃到飯開心），然後對於課佬（畢竟是你們矚目對象）給予雙倍的儲值獎勵畢竟我一直以來支撐你遊到你該之前+12 現在萌新都有了，課佬我是不是純傻？ 
  總而言之福利方面你們人更多更好討論，與其在那邊更新收藏館給我1200銀芯我又抽不到，期望差太多（你遊想要的與玩家能做到的）不如好好想一下如何讓大家都吃到肉機制都做好了遊戲也努力了，那大家能不能都更享受這遊戲一些

content:
I'm glad to know more about how operations are going and some of the plans. I do see some key issues (incl. story not feeling in-line with the world, new gamemodes/content in general, community management) being addressed, which is a good sign.

My only request is that there is more information about Axioms soon, as it is something a large number of players (including me) are interested in.
thread_title: 对各位守密人的致歉与近况说明 Apology and Update to All Keepers

content:
While i do enjoy the transparency, part of me always has a bit of a foot back in relation to growth, since generally speaking, the bigger a game grows, the higher the chance the team will become "corporatized", let's say. I do enjoy the perceived "unprofessionality" more than treating a group of people like purely a business, i love experimentation, even if it fails, we're all humans after all.

I hope you take the fitting breaks once all of this is done, because i do understand from practice how limiting stress can feel, and i'm happy to hear about the vision of the group coming to a satisfactory result, thank you for this amazing game. <:naruhodo:1004443639826624602>

will have to receive feed back and communication regardless.
That is the heart of professionalism but as a player, I have no issues with giving you the time you need.
Please give us a good explanation and do your best to inspire some faith into us players.

content: The complaint is basically different. Many versions of the game that aren't in English or Chinese have a text problem where everything is written in hieroglyphs instead of text. Updating the archive is good, but for example, I want to read descriptions of artifacts and game tabs, but when it's all written in hieroglyphs, I just give up. If you don't have enough staff for translation, you can ask your own community for help with this.
